response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. The audio is in English, contradicting the Reference JSON's claim of Japanese dialogue; I have ignored the JSON and transcribed the English audio. 2. No vocal songs are present, only character dialogue and instrumental BGM. 3. Timestamps are strictly synchronized to the vocal audio waveform. 4. On-screen text for character names and game rules has been transcribed and translated as secondary priority. 5. No closed captioning tags or non-vocal audio descriptions were included.

subtitles.original: Ah, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop!
subtitles.english: Ah, stop, stop, stop, stop, stop!

subtitles.original: Okay, let's go this way!
subtitles.english: Okay, let's go this way!

subtitles.original: Let's find a driving teacher!
subtitles.english: Let's find a driving teacher!

subtitles.original: Hmm... Huh.
subtitles.english: Hmm... Huh.

subtitles.original: According to the Otomo, this is where I'm supposed to go.
subtitles.english: According to the Otomo, this is where I'm supposed to go.

subtitles.original: But no one's here. Huh?
subtitles.english: But no one's here. Huh?

subtitles.original: Whoa!
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: Whoa, whoa! Be careful!
subtitles.english: Whoa, whoa! Be careful!

subtitles.original: Danger, danger! Oh my god!
subtitles.english: Danger, danger! Oh my god!

subtitles.original: Hi everyone!
subtitles.english: Hi everyone!

subtitles.original: What are you guys doing here?
subtitles.english: What are you guys doing here?

subtitles.original: Oh, actually a little Otomo told us...
subtitles.english: Oh, actually a little Otomo told us...

subtitles.original: ...that you were really bad at driving.
subtitles.english: ...that you were really bad at driving.

subtitles.original: No! No! No!
subtitles.english: No! No! No!

subtitles.original: That's a lie. That's fake.
subtitles.english: That's a lie. That's fake.

subtitles.original: But anyway...
subtitles.english: But anyway...

subtitles.original: Very big galaxy brain Ririka...
subtitles.english: Very big galaxy brain Ririka...

subtitles.original: ...and Biboo...
subtitles.english: ...and Biboo...

subtitles.original: ...and Sora-senpai...
subtitles.english: ...and Sora-senpai...

subtitles.original: ...will tell you how to drive! Yay!
subtitles.english: ...will tell you how to drive! Yay!

subtitles.original: Can you guys drive?
subtitles.english: Can you guys drive?

subtitles.original: Sure! We're the best!
subtitles.english: Sure! We're the best!

subtitles.original: I totally have a license... No I don't. But it's fine.
subtitles.english: I totally have a license... No I don't. But it's fine.

subtitles.original: Okay, I think if you guys are teaching me...
subtitles.english: Okay, I think if you guys are teaching me...

subtitles.original: ...I have nothing to worry about. So, let's do it.
subtitles.english: ...I have nothing to worry about. So, let's do it.

subtitles.original: Okay! Well, if you're ready, please get on the vehicle.
subtitles.english: Okay! Well, if you're ready, please get on the vehicle.

subtitles.original: Your noble steed.
subtitles.english: Your noble steed.

subtitles.original: So what do I do?
subtitles.english: So what do I do?

subtitles.original: Um, you do the you turn the you go... Wait! Whoa!
subtitles.english: Um, you do the you turn the you go... Wait! Whoa!

subtitles.original: Cece! Are you okay? Are you alright?
subtitles.english: Cece! Are you okay? Are you alright?

subtitles.original: Wait, wait, no, no, no, I'm okay, I'm okay, I'm okay.
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, no, no, no, I'm okay, I'm okay, I'm okay.

subtitles.original: Guys, don't worry.
subtitles.english: Guys, don't worry.

subtitles.original: No, it's okay.
subtitles.english: No, it's okay.

subtitles.original: Oh, but that could've gone better I think.
subtitles.english: Oh, but that could've gone better I think.

subtitles.original: So let me show you how it's done! Yay!
subtitles.english: So let me show you how it's done! Yay!

subtitles.original: Okay! We'll call this the practical task.
subtitles.english: Okay! We'll call this the practical task.

subtitles.original: Get hit and you'll go boom! Holokart Time Attack!
subtitles.english: Get hit and you'll go boom! Holokart Time Attack!

subtitles.original: Our racing course is ready! Look, look!
subtitles.english: Our racing course is ready! Look, look!

subtitles.original: The rules are simple.
subtitles.english: The rules are simple.

subtitles.original: The four of us will compete to see who has the fastest time...
subtitles.english: The four of us will compete to see who has the fastest time...

subtitles.original: ...completing the course while avoiding the obstacles.
subtitles.english: ...completing the course while avoiding the obstacles.

subtitles.original: The course starts with two cones.
subtitles.english: The course starts with two cones.

subtitles.original: Feel free to dodge it, or just knock it down if it's in your way.
subtitles.english: Feel free to dodge it, or just knock it down if it's in your way.

subtitles.original: Then you'll enter the barrel zone!
subtitles.english: Then you'll enter the barrel zone!

subtitles.original: Dodge them like a pro!
subtitles.english: Dodge them like a pro!

subtitles.original: And then finally, you aim for the perfect park at the finish line...
subtitles.english: And then finally, you aim for the perfect park at the finish line...

subtitles.original: ...to clear the course.
subtitles.english: ...to clear the course.

subtitles.original: Yay! Simple enough, right? Easy, easy, easy!
subtitles.english: Yay! Simple enough, right? Easy, easy, easy!

subtitles.original: But, but! If you mess up or hit anything other than the cones...
subtitles.english: But, but! If you mess up or hit anything other than the cones...

subtitles.original: Total explosion!
subtitles.english: Total explosion!

subtitles.original: Uh oh!
subtitles.english: Uh oh!

subtitles.original: And it won't just explode.
subtitles.english: And it won't just explode.

subtitles.original: Each explosion adds a penalty of three seconds to your time.
subtitles.english: Each explosion adds a penalty of three seconds to your time.

subtitles.original: So, try not to risk it.
subtitles.english: So, try not to risk it.

subtitles.original: Or risk it, or do it fast, it's totally up to you.
subtitles.english: Or risk it, or do it fast, it's totally up to you.

subtitles.original: I don't want to die! Nooo!
subtitles.english: I don't want to die! Nooo!

subtitles.original: Okay, I'll go first and show Cece how it's done! Yay!
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll go first and show Cece how it's done! Yay!

subtitles.original: I'm so nervous.
subtitles.english: I'm so nervous.

subtitles.original: Okay, pre-race interview.
subtitles.english: Okay, pre-race interview.

subtitles.original: Sora-senpai, is there anything you would like to say?
subtitles.english: Sora-senpai, is there anything you would like to say?

subtitles.original: I'll do my best and have fun!
subtitles.english: I'll do my best and have fun!

subtitles.original: Okay! Yay!
subtitles.english: Okay! Yay!
